activities_projects.title: Identifying Resources Around Us
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of resources and identify them in daily life
steps: List ten items used in daily life
Identify the natural resource used to produce each item
Classify them as renewable or non-renewable
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how natural resources are used in everyday life

activities_projects.title: Types of Resources Chart
steps: Create a chart showing types of resources
Divide them based on origin, exhaustibility, ownership, and status of development
Give two examples for each category
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand different ways resources are classified

activities_projects.title: Survey on Resource Usage
steps: Conduct a small survey in your neighbourhood
Ask people about water, electricity, and fuel usage
Record responses and summarize results
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about consumption patterns of resources

activities_projects.title: Resource Conservation Poster
steps: Design a poster on 'Save Natural Resources'
Include slogans and illustrations
Display it in classroom or school

activities_projects.title: Land Use Observation
steps: Observe different land uses in your locality
List areas used for agriculture, housing, roads, and parks
Explain why each land type is used that way

activities_projects.title: Causes of Land Degradation
steps: List major causes such as deforestation, overgrazing, mining
Explain each cause in brief
Suggest one method to reduce each cause
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand human impact on land

activities_projects.title: Soil Types Map Activity
activities_projects.objective: Learn major soil types in India
steps: Draw or print an outline map of India
Mark major soil types such as alluvial, black, red, laterite, arid
Label regions where each soil type is found
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand distribution of soil types

activities_projects.title: Soil Erosion Demonstration
steps: Place soil in a tray and pour water slowly
Observe how soil moves with water
Record observations about erosion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand effects of water erosion

activities_projects.title: Methods of Soil Conservation
steps: List methods like terrace farming, contour ploughing, strip cropping
Draw simple diagrams for each method
Explain how they reduce soil erosion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand techniques to protect soil
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of diagrams and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Resource Planning in India
steps: Explain the three steps of resource planning
Give examples from India
Write why resource planning is important
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand planning for sustainable development
